title: Expert Intelligence & Analytics (m/w/d)
required_skills: KPI design, dashboard and report development
Executive Summaries and ad-hoc analyses for management
Business requirements translation into functional specifications
Cross-functional stakeholder collaboration (Controlling, Investment, Product, Tech)
bonus_skills: BI and visualization tools (Power BI, Looker Studio)
matched_skills: Marketing KPI framework design → KPI target setting and dashboard development
C-level data storytelling → Executive Summaries and management reporting
Cross-functional stakeholder management → business partner role across Controlling/Product/Tech
Data quality, tracking & QA → QA of management-relevant KPIs and dashboards
Market segmentation & intelligence → performance analysis across client, product, channel
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics → revenue and margin analysis
Funnel & conversion analysis → performance driver identification
SQL & data modelling → complex data model analysis
Python scripting → automation and tooling support
Power BI (PL-300 certified), Looker Studio, Qlik Sense → reporting and visualization solutions
Customer segmentation & cohort analysis → multi-dimensional client/channel analysis
missing_skills: Media agency investment business domain knowledge (pricing, margin, media inventory)
Forecasting and scenario modelling for financial/investment steering
Writing functional specifications for BI/Tech teams (data model documentation)
Revenue management in an agency or media context
core_responsibilities: Revenue and margin analysis, KPI target setting and performance tracking across clients, products and channels
Scenario analyses and forecast development for investment business steering
Design, develop and QA management-relevant KPIs, dashboards and reports
Ad-hoc analyses and Executive Summaries for management and stakeholders with actionable recommendations

recommended_emphasis: KPI framework design and dashboard development experience (Power BI PL-300 certification is a strong differentiator)
C-level / executive reporting and data storytelling — directly maps to Executive Summaries responsibility
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination bridging technical and business teams (mirrors Controlling/Product/Tech partner role)
QA and data quality experience from Hapag-Lloyd sprint reviews
Revenue and ROI analytics from HSBC programme (USD 8M budget variance dashboards, burn-rate reporting)
Multi-dimensional analysis across segments, channels and markets (EMEA/APAC coverage)
Python and SQL for data modelling and automation

company_info.size_raw: ~200-500 employees in Germany; part of Publicis Groupe global network (100+ countries)
